description: A new customer (e.g., a school or non-profit) is tax-exempt and provides their exemption certificate.

nodes.task_description: Receive the tax-exempt certificate from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the certificate is legitimate.

nodes.task_description: Update the customer's account to be tax-exempt.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully flags the account as tax-exempt, ensuring future orders are not charged sales tax.
